name: phonedesk
description: A polished local launcher and remote mouse dashboard for Windows and Linux.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c green,cyan "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run build --prefix client && npm run copy-client --prefix server && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix client && npm run typecheck --prefix server
scripts.start: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run start --prefix server
